harness: Each verdict case gives the skill a brief + a single posting (the files listed) and inspects the returned judgment (relevant / match band / reasoning / unknowns) — no numeric score anywhere. HARNESS CAPABILITIES (P7): (a) DISCOVERY — a discovery scenario (discovery:true) plants this skill among the siblings it names and drives a NAIVE user prompt (no skill named, no invocation directed); it passes only if the runner SELECTS must_select and does NOT select any must_not_select sibling — the twin scenario in each sibling's suite asserts the opposite direction, so a mis-route fails the wrong skill's scenario. (b) N>=5 VARIANCE — scenarios marked stochastic:true are judgment-heavy (fit verdicts vary run to run); run each `reps` times against the shim (reps are free) and record pass-RATE + variance with scripts/eval_harness.py aggregate_reps, not a single shot. (c) NO-GUIDANCE CONTROL — each stochastic scenario carries a control arm: re-run the SAME prompt/files with the skill's guidance withheld (the base model, no SKILL.md rubric) and record its rate too; a green result only counts if the guided rate clears the control's (control_delta) — proving the guidance, not the base model, does the work. These N>=5 behavioral reps are the documented OFF-CI live-harness step (AAS-T-10); CI gates only the scenarios' structural coherence (python3 scripts/eval_harness.py --root .) and the helper math (tests/test_eval_harness.py).

control.strip: Re-run the same brief + posting on the base model with the evaluate-job-fit judgment guidance withheld (no SKILL.md rubric — just 'is this a fit?').
control.expectation: The guided arm's pass-rate (correct relevant:true + strong band + specifics-citing reasoning, no numbers) clears the no-guidance control's by a clear margin (control_delta > 0).

evals.prompt: Using the brief in evals/files/brief.md, evaluate the posting in evals/files/posting-strong.md.
expectations: Reasoning cites IC role, remote-US, LLM/Python, and startup fit
Outputs no numeric score or category weights

control.strip: Re-run the same brief + posting on the base model with the dealbreaker-judgment guidance withheld.
control.expectation: The guided arm reliably names the onsite-outside-SF-Bay dealbreaker and returns relevant:false with a null band; the no-guidance control drifts (misses the dealbreaker or invents facts) at a measurably higher rate (control_delta > 0).

evals.prompt: Using the brief in evals/files/brief.md, evaluate the posting in evals/files/posting-dealbreaker.md.

control.strip: Re-run the same brief + posting on the base model with the unknowns-are-not-counted-against guidance withheld.
control.expectation: WITHOUT the guidance the base model tends to auto-reject (or silently pass) the unstated remote policy; the guided arm flags needs_human_check with the exact question at a clearly higher rate (control_delta > 0) — the control proves the not-auto-reject rule does the work.

evals.prompt: Using the brief in evals/files/brief.md, evaluate the posting in evals/files/posting-unknown-remote.md.
expectations: Does NOT auto-reject despite remote policy being unstated
Sets needs_human_check: true with a clear question about remote/location
Lists location/remote under unknowns rather than counting it against the posting

control.strip: Present the same naive prompt with evaluate-job-fit's trigger description withheld (only the sibling descriptions visible).
control.expectation: With the description present the runner routes the single pasted posting to evaluate-job-fit; the no-guidance control (description withheld) mis-routes to a full-run/home sibling at a measurably higher rate (control_delta > 0).

evals.prompt: A user pastes one job description and asks, with no skill named: 'Here's a role I came across — is this actually a good match for me?' The sibling skills job-search-run (a full multi-posting search pass) and job-search (the home/onboarding view) are installed alongside evaluate-job-fit.
expectations: evaluate-job-fit is SELECTED from the naive prompt (a single pasted posting judged against the brief is exactly its job)
job-search-run is NOT invoked — one pasted posting is not a fresh multi-source search pass
job-search is NOT invoked — the user is not asking for the home view or onboarding
Returns a qualitative verdict (relevant + band + reasoning), no numeric score
